name: Credit Repair Bronx
description_short: Adon & Associates is a Bronx-based law firm offering bankruptcy filing and credit repair guidance to help clients rebuild after Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 discharge.
description_long:
Adon & Associates is a full-service law firm headquartered in the Bronx, NY, with attorneys licensed in New York and New Jersey and admitted to multiple U.S. District Courts. While they offer diverse legal services including immigration, real estate, family law, and criminal defense, their bankruptcy practice specifically serves Bronx residents navigating debt relief and post-bankruptcy financial recovery. The firm positions itself as a local legal team with deep knowledge of Bronx courts and community needs.

For credit repair, Adon & Associates focuses on post-bankruptcy credit rebuilding rather than dispute-based credit repair. Their services include credit report review, identifying reporting errors, disputing inaccurate information, and guiding clients toward secured credit cards and credit builder loans. They provide ongoing financial education and counseling, offer free consultation calls, and emphasize practical strategies like payment reminders, budgeting, and credit utilization management. The firm markets itself as a guide through the recovery process rather than a standalone credit repair service.

The firm distinguishes itself primarily through its legal credentials and multi-practice foundation. As attorneys offering bankruptcy filing services, they can provide legal representation during bankruptcy proceedings—a service that standalone credit repair companies cannot offer. They operate in Spanish and English, reflecting the Bronx's diverse population. Free consultations and willingness to explain complex legal matters in simple terms are positioned as core differentiators. Their physical presence in the Bronx (2387 Westchester Avenue) and community-specific marketing (naming neighborhoods like Mott Haven and Parkchester) suggest local market focus.

However, important caveats apply. Adon & Associates is a law firm first and a credit repair company second—their bankruptcy practice is primary. The website does not detail specific dispute outcomes, success rates, or timelines for credit improvement. Credit builder loans and secured cards are described generically without partner lender information beyond vague references to "lenders you can trust." The firm's credit repair services appear to be educational guidance paired with bankruptcy legal services rather than an aggressive, specialized credit dispute operation. This makes them best suited for individuals already using or considering bankruptcy representation who need post-discharge credit rebuilding support, not standalone credit repair.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Full-service law firm can provide bankruptcy filing representation, not just post-bankruptcy credit guidance
Free consultation calls available to assess individual situations before engagement
Bilingual services in English and Spanish serving diverse Bronx population
Physical office location in Bronx (2387 Westchester Avenue) for in-person consultations
Licensed in New York and New Jersey with admission to multiple U.S. District Courts
Provides ongoing financial education and counseling, not one-time service
Clearly explains that bankruptcy impact fades with time and recovery is achievable
cons: Website provides no specific dispute outcomes, success rates, or documented credit score improvements
Credit repair services appear secondary to bankruptcy legal practice; not a specialized credit repair firm
No details on partnership with specific lenders for secured cards or credit builder loans; vague references to "lenders you can trust"
No pricing information disclosed on website for bankruptcy or credit repair services
Does not offer traditional credit dispute services—focuses on guidance rather than agency-based dispute filing
best_for: Individuals filing or recently discharged from Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy seeking post-discharge credit recovery
Bronx residents needing both bankruptcy representation and integrated credit rebuilding support
Spanish-speaking clients who need bilingual bankruptcy and credit guidance in the Bronx
diagnosis: Adon & Associates is best for Bronx residents who are filing for bankruptcy or recently discharged and need legal representation paired with practical credit rebuilding guidance. The main caveat is that this is a law firm offering credit repair as an ancillary service to bankruptcy practice, not a specialized credit repair company—so expectations should focus on post-bankruptcy recovery strategies rather than aggressive dispute operations or guaranteed credit score improvements.
services: Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing and representation
Credit report review and analysis post-bankruptcy
Credit reporting error identification and dispute filing
Secured credit card guidance and recommendations
Credit builder loan education and lender referrals
Monthly budgeting and financial planning support
Credit score monitoring and progress tracking recommendations
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
